name: K Wedding Dream
description: Immerse yourself in the atmosphere of Korean love with the heroes of this dress-up game. Become a part of a magical story where bright K-Pop stars are preparing for the most important day of their lives - their Wedding day! Combine tradition and modern fashion by creating wedding looks for lovers. Choose the perfect makeup, hairstyle and jewelry to highlight their unique style and charm. Let each of your choices reflect the emotions and dreams of the characters, turning this day into a real fairy tale!
instructions: Help the couple create a Korean-style wedding look The most interesting images can be saved as a screenshot in PNG format Depending on the gaming device either a click of a computer mouse or a simple touch on touchscreens is used to control it
